香港菁英會學界菁英理事會梁浩賢主席：

鄙人與 閣下於皇仁及科大同窗十年，現見 閣下貴為香港菁英會轄下學界菁英理事會主席，冀向現今同處學界之菁英討教，望不吝賜教，真理愈辯愈明。

素知 閣下修讀環球商業管理，必為學界菁英、未來商界棟樑，對本港社會撕裂及經濟波動之因素——逃犯條例修訂風波想必有獨到見解。六月過百萬市民上街後，特首林鄭月娥宣告繼續二讀，而和平理性的示威演變成衝擊立法會，換來「暫緩」的是與 閣下年齡相約的年輕人的汗水及鮮血。其後香港人經歷一場動盪的夏天，更多的和平集會，以至全球登報、不合作運動、佔領立法會、各區連儂牆，抗爭遍地開花，甚至不幸有以死明志的年輕人。抗爭迎接而來的卻非政府的聆聽，而是打開警察濫權濫捕、警黑勾結的潘多拉盒子。

於警察威權及黑社會白色恐怖之下，不少抗爭者及記者身體受傷害，傷重者更單目失明；街坊市民平白無故吸入有害催淚彈，路邊長者眼鼻不適、初生嬰兒罹患紅疹；年輕如十三歲女童等遭無差別被捕者更可能面對牢獄之災及喪失 閣下現今所處之大好青春。同為香港一員，相信 閣下身為港人，對兩個月來的新聞畫面歷歷在目，漫長炎夏罄竹難書，容鄙人在此駐筆。

得悉 貴會香港菁英會宗旨為「匯聚青年精英、研究傳播國情、關注社會熱點、構建時政智庫」，更蒙行政長官林鄭月娥、中聯辦主任王志民、副主任仇鴻及陳冬贊助，龐大資源下定必對有社會熱點過人見解。 閣下在 貴組織學界菁英中，與其他青年精英積極參與社會事務以及籌劃例如交流團及社會服務等各種青年活動，亦無疑對現今香港青年面對的困境瞭如指掌。

鄙人敢請教主席，香港面對主權移交後前所未有的社經困局，各方應當何去何從？特區政府及中聯辦對 貴會及 貴組織寄予厚望，於社會日益撕裂、反對政權聲音一波接一波之際， 貴會及 閣下亦應該如何自處？望昔日同窗依然能切磋砥礪，鄙人洗耳恭聽。

謹祝 光復香港 時代革命

香港菁英會學界菁英理事會梁浩賢主席：

鄙人與 閣下於皇仁及科大同窗十年，現見 閣下貴為香港菁英會轄下學界菁英理事會主席，冀向現今同處學界之菁英討教，望不吝賜教，真理愈辯愈明。

素知 閣下修讀環球商業管理，必為學界菁英、未來商界棟樑，對本港社會撕裂及經濟波動之因素——逃犯條例修訂風波想必有獨到見解。六月過百萬市民上街後，特首林鄭月娥宣告繼續二讀，而和平理性的示威演變成衝擊立法會，換來「暫緩」的是與 閣下年齡相約的年輕人的汗水及鮮血。其後香港人經歷一場動盪的夏天，更多的和平集會，以至全球登報、不合作運動、佔領立法會、各區連儂牆，抗爭遍地開花，甚至不幸有以死明志的年輕人。抗爭迎接而來的卻非政府的聆聽，而是打開警察濫權濫捕、警黑勾結的潘多拉盒子。

於警察威權及黑社會白色恐怖之下，不少抗爭者及記者身體受傷害，傷重者更單目失明；街坊市民平白無故吸入有害催淚彈，路邊長者眼鼻不適、初生嬰兒罹患紅疹；年輕如十三歲女童等遭無差別被捕者更可能面對牢獄之災及喪失 閣下現今所處之大好青春。同為香港一員，相信 閣下身為港人，對兩個月來的新聞畫面歷歷在目，漫長炎夏罄竹難書，容鄙人在此駐筆。

得悉 貴會香港菁英會宗旨為「匯聚青年精英、研究傳播國情、關注社會熱點、構建時政智庫」，更蒙行政長官林鄭月娥、中聯辦主任王志民、副主任仇鴻及陳冬贊助，龐大資源下定必對有社會熱點過人見解。 閣下在 貴組織學界菁英中，與其他青年精英積極參與社會事務以及籌劃例如交流團及社會服務等各種青年活動，亦無疑對現今香港青年面對的困境瞭如指掌。

鄙人敢請教主席，香港面對主權移交後前所未有的社經困局，各方應當何去何從？特區政府及中聯辦對 貴會及 貴組織寄予厚望，於社會日益撕裂、反對政權聲音一波接一波之際， 貴會及 閣下亦應該如何自處？望昔日同窗依然能切磋砥礪，鄙人洗耳恭聽。

［振翅即時］同學再次圍堵懷疑破壞大字報牆學生 校方要求報警處理

今日下午約六時，再有懷疑破壞大字報牆的學生被同學圍堵。該學生操流利廣東話，報稱為香港人，並承認破壞了大字報牆。學生會代表一如上次協商做法，提出報警處理或者拍下道歉影片與賠償，但該學生未作回覆。

於學生會代表協商期間，學務長辦公室的職員(見圖二)突然介入，質問學生會代表是否認為該同學的行為犯法。學生會代表指出該同學被錄下刑事毀壞的行為，但正協商是否要報警處理。校方代表未待被圍堵的同學作出任何回應，便以「學生會認為該同學犯法」為由要求學生會代表報警處理。學生會代表聽從了校方要求，報警要求警員處理這項懷疑刑事毀壞的事件。

據悉，有警員曾經抵達科大範圍準備到場，但於本校保安部協商後，決定有需要才通知警方到場處理，因此這次圍堵事件全程均沒有警方在場。

該名懷疑破壞大字報牆的學生於學生會代表報警後，表示希望能與一至兩個學生會代表進行私底下的協商，但被學校職員及保安帶到角落。學生會代表再次嘗試與該學生溝通，但這時理學院院長汪洋教授上前調解，對該學生聲稱 “you dont have to say anything”及 “call the police”，參與圍堵的同學質疑是否包庇違反大字報牆規例的同學，情緒一度鼓譟。隨後該同學在兩名教授、學校職員及保安的保護下安然離去(圖四)，過程中亦無發生任何肢體衝突。

學生會代表其後質疑校方為何不給該學生任何考慮時間，並且介入學生之間的溝通，不給雙方協商的機會。校方代表回應指介入事件的原意是「讓事情和平解決」，又稱「校方永遠不會退場」，會繼續在類似糾紛中介入。有同學質疑校方的介入直接造成事件只能報警解決，反而不利事件和平解決，校方只回應指有溝通及改善空間。

Dear Members of HKUST,

It has only been Monday since we last communicated, and yet we are saddened to see an escalation of incidents on campus involving behavior that is incompatible with our University’s fundamental values and code of conduct. Over the past few days, we have seen repeated instances of such unacceptable behavior, including verbal and physical harassment, suppressing the speech of others, unauthorized disclosure and dissemination of personal data, intimidation, and bullying both on-line and in person. Such acts are expressly forbidden and cannot be tolerated.

Yesterday, another student who previously removed some posters from the Big Character Poster (BCP) Wall, was surrounded by a group of students who pressured him to apologize on camera. Not only was the student in question in great distress, a colleague who attempted to mediate the situation was also identified and ridiculed on social media. As a community, we cannot allow these actions to continue.

Our primary means of supporting our core values is through our own actions and support for one another. To handle serious violations of our code of conduct (https://acadreg.ust.hk/A_Regulations_for_Student_Conduct_20190219.pdf), HKUST has an established disciplinary process. When an HKUST member acts inappropriately, no one can take the matters into their own hands by penalizing anyone in the ways that they deem fit. The University is investigating recent violations—including improper removal of materials and subsequent bullying, coercion and physical offense—for submission to the Senate Student Disciplinary Committee. To respect the rights and privacy of those involved, any related data, videos and photos should be removed from social media immediately.

We would also like to remind everyone that there are legal implications of such behaviors. Some of these behaviors may constitute criminal offenses, such as unauthorized disclosure of personal data, intimidation, false imprisonment, and possibly other offenses. Furthermore, an unlawful behavior today may impact an individual’s future. All members are urged to think carefully about their actions.

We are deeply dismayed by the anger and frustration triggered by recent conflicts on campus. All of us who have chosen to be members of HKUST have pledged to uphold respectful behavior consistent with our shared values. We recognize that this is not easy in the face of contested realities, but let’s remember what brought us all to HKUST to begin with as a community, rather than reproducing the hostility that has engulfed Hong Kong over the past several months.


With warmest regards,

Wei SHYY, President
Lionel NI, Provost
Mark HODGSON, Vice-President for Administration and Business
Nancy IP, Vice-President for Research and Development
Sabrina LIN, Vice-President for Institutional Advancement

When an HKUST member acts inappropriately, no one can take the matters into their own hands by penalizing anyone in the ways that they deem fit. The University is investigating recent violations—including improper removal of materials and subsequent bullying, coercion and physical offense—for submission to the Senate Student Disciplinary Committee. To respect the rights and privacy of those involved, any related data, videos and photos should be removed from social media immediately.

We would also like to remind everyone that there are legal implications of such behaviors. Some of these behaviors may constitute criminal offenses, such as unauthorized disclosure of personal data, intimidation, false imprisonment, and possibly other offenses. Furthermore, an unlawful behavior today may impact an individual’s future. All members are urged to think carefully about their actions.

We are deeply dismayed by the anger and frustration triggered by recent conflicts on campus. All of us who have chosen to be members of HKUST have pledged to uphold respectful behavior consistent with our shared values. We recognize that this is not easy in the face of contested realities, but let’s remember what brought us all to HKUST to begin with as a community, rather than reproducing the hostility that has engulfed Hong Kong over the past several months.

《科大學生會就科大前線專頁懷疑行騙之聲明》

本會日前接獲通知，指有網上專頁以科大前線之名收取捐款，並聲稱與本會及專頁hkpoliticalmemes等存有合作關係，聲稱所得捐款將用以支援反送中運動參與者，其專頁又獲得 林溢欣 等人推廣，導致追隨者及捐款者人數急升。由於事態嚴重，本會於昨日已經澄清從未授權任何人或組織代本會收取捐款，亦未有發起任何募捐，並呼籲各位考慮捐款予該專頁前請再三考慮，提防網上騙徒。

本會隨即展開調查並聯絡相關組織，並於本日內完成調查。根據本會所獲得對話內容，科大前線專頁指示意欲捐款者存款到Noah's Ark Technologies Limited，本會經過搜證及查冊，證實該公司兩位董事為仍就讀科大之馮雋裕同學及熊俊文同學，該公司網上專頁亦以科大作為招徠，定位為網頁設計。本會翻查紀錄，發現馮同學曾向本會反送中支援基金申請以十萬計巨額援助，遠超其他申請，馮同學當時聲稱向Noah's Ark Technologies Limited購買了大量物資，希望本會可以全數資助，由於本會從未見過該批物資，馮同學亦未能證實該批物資之存在，故拒絕批出。本會與hkpoliticalmemes專頁互相核實，證實科大前線專頁管理員之一亦為馮同學。

本會亦發現科大前線專頁內容涉及抄襲，科大前線專頁以本會反送中支援基金月報表及612人道支援基金之海報作為該專頁宣傳內容，本會保留法律追究權利。

本會對科大前線專頁利用反送中民眾互相支持之善心騙取大量捐款予以最嚴厲譴責，並將於不日內採取行動。本會亦呼籲曾捐款予該專頁者聯絡本會及採取法律行動追討。本會再次提醒各界人士捐款前請詳細考慮該組織之真偽及可信性，切勿助長騙徒以反送中之名獲利。
